channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Equinix offering targets automated AI-centric network operations
item.description: Equinix has introduced Fabric Intelligence, a service designed to automate and optimize network infrastructure as enterprises scale artificial intelligence workloads across multiple distributed locations.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: How to think about Apple Business
item.description: Apple Business is aimed at small businesses coalesced around Macs, iPhones, and iPads. If that’s you, and all your systems are made by Apple, the service is likely to be all you need to run a small operation of up to a few dozen seats.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: When cloud giants neglect resilience
item.description: In a recent article chronicling the history of Microsoft Azure and its intensifying woes, we see a narrative that has been building throughout the industry for years.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: OpenAI shifts its focus to business users amid Anthropic pressure
item.description: The same ChatGPT chatbot that gave OpenAI’s chief financial officer Sarah Friar a tilapia recipe for a recent Sunday night dinner at home is also now doing her most mundane tasks at work like summarizing her emails and Slack messages.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: Younger adult colon cancer deaths are concentrated in people with less education, study says
item.description: A new study finds the worrisome rise in colorectal cancer deaths among younger adults is concentrated in people with less education.
item.dc:creator: Mike Stobbe, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Satellite backhaul service Globalstar has a new, rich owner amid challenging market conditions
item.description: Globalstar, a mobile satellite services (MSS) operator in which Apple has a 20% stake, on Tuesday announced a merger agreement with Amazon, which, pending regulatory approval, could soon bring direct to device services (D2D) services to Leo, the latter’s low Earth orbit satellite network.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: GitHub adds Stacked PRs to speed complex code reviews
item.description: AI-aided development tools are churning out more lines of code than ever, presenting a challenge for reviewers who must review ever larger pull requests.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: The hyperscalers are pricing themselves out of AI workloads
item.description: Large cloud providers still want the market to believe that AI infrastructure is a premium business where customers pay premium prices.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Mastering the dull reality of sexy AI
item.description: This week in New York, my Oracle team ran workshops for enterprise developers on building retrieval-augmented generation and agentic applications. Interest was so strong that we quickly had to figure out how to double the room’s capacity (much to the fire marshal’s chagrin).
item.dc:creator: Info World
